Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of primary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.

Level-3 crop type classification for the 2023 growing season. Satellite-derived crop categories mapped at parcel level. Each colour represents a specific crop type (e.g. wheat, barley, maize, legumes).

categories.label: Beans, Peas,  Lentil, Hose Peas, Chick Peas

meta.description: Global maps of spring cereals for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Global maps of winter cereals for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Global maps of maize for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Global maps of temporary crops for 2021, at 10m resolution. This identifies pieces of land that are sowed/planted and harvestable at least once within the 12 months after the sowing/planting date.
AI-detected conservation and conventional tillage events at parcel level across Estonia (2018–2022). Parcels rasterised at 10 m resolution. Derived from Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2 and Landsat imagery.
Satellite-derived vegetation index (NDVI) from Sentinel-2. Indicates vegetation density and photosynthetic activity. Time series available.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of secondary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Provides at pan-European level in the spatial resolution of 10 m and 100 m the level of tree cover density in a range from 0% to 100%
Growing stock volume (V) in m³/ha in 20 m spatial resolution created with the BIOMASAR method using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Above ground biomass (AGB) in t/ha in 20 m spatial resolution created with the BIOMASAR method using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Below ground biomass (BGB) in t/ha in 20 m spatial resolution created with the BIOMASAR method using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Water level trend over the period 2017-24 (in mm/yr).

Satellite-derived Fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetically Active Radiation (FAPAR) from Sentinel-2.
Indicates vegetation photosynthetic activity and plant productivity.
Time series available.
